name: workflow-backend
description: Event-driven shared workflow backend with on-chain state transitions, processor workers, and projected queue/activity views.
use_case: Use Xian as the authoritative workflow state machine while Python workers process jobs, hydrate projected queue views, and expose an API for current state and history.

starter_flows.name: local
starter_flows.summary: Run the workflow backend locally with indexed reads, a processor worker, a projector worker, and the deeper API flow.

steps.title: Create and start the local indexed node
commands: uv run xian network create workflow-backend-local --template single-node-indexed --chain-id workflow-backend-local-1 --generate-validator-key --init-node
uv run xian node start validator-1
uv run xian node endpoints validator-1
notes: Run these commands from the xian-cli checkout.
The indexed local template gives the processor/projector pair the BDS and monitoring surfaces they expect.

steps.title: Bootstrap the workflow contract
notes: Run these commands from the xian-py checkout.
Set XIAN_NODE_URL, XIAN_CHAIN_ID, XIAN_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY, and worker-related env vars before bootstrapping.

steps.title: Run the processor, projector, and API
notes: The processor claims and completes submitted items. The projector rebuilds queue/activity views from indexed events plus authoritative reads.
The API exposes current item state and projected queue/activity surfaces.

starter_flows.name: remote
starter_flows.summary: Deploy the workflow backend on a remote Linux host and keep the processor/projector/API pattern pointed at the deployed node.

steps.title: Create the remote-oriented network bundle
commands: uv run xian network create workflow-backend-remote --template embedded-backend --chain-id workflow-backend-remote-1 --generate-validator-key
notes: Run this command from the xian-cli checkout.
The embedded-backend template matches the event-driven service posture of this pack.

steps.title: Deploy and validate the remote node
notes: Run these commands from the xian-deploy checkout with your inventory and prepared node-home inputs.
Use the health playbook to confirm runtime, BDS, monitoring, and recovery readiness.

steps.title: Bootstrap the contract and run the workflow services
notes: Run these commands from the xian-py checkout against the remote endpoints.
Keep the processor and projector as separate long-running services so claiming and projection remain explicit.
